Emphasis Serializer Repro

These security requirements are not new, and contractors familiar with federal work will recognize them immediately. What is new, however, is the plan to verify contractor compliance with these requirements before any award is made under the program.

Starting November 10, 2025, contracting officers are required to include the program requirement on all covered contractor information systems (i.e., information systems that process, store, or transmit federal contract information) in solicitations and the resulting contracts, at the level dictated by the program office.

This closing paragraph exists to give the extractor enough prose to treat the page as a real article rather than boilerplate, which keeps the reproduction faithful to the original context where the mangling was first observed in the wild.
